meta.notes: Mixed Tier-1 (Wowhead Quotes) + Tier-2 (wiki + Whisper) entries.

quotes.text: Defilers... so it is you who have befouled these woods with the Nightmare.
I just had... the strangest nightmare...
I see now... I am the defiler...
I will bleed the Nightmare from you!
The Nightmare... clouds my thoughts no more...
Defilers... I can smell the Nightmare in your blood. Be gone from these woods or suffer nature's wrath!
quotes.transcript: Defilers, I can smell the nightmare in your blood. Be gone from these woods or suffer nature's wrath!

quotes.text: I sense a powerful druid among you. You dare to challenge my authority?
quotes.transcript: I sense a powerful druid among you. You dare to challenge my authority?

quotes.text: I am nature's fury incarnate!
quotes.transcript: I am Nature's Fury incarnate!

quotes.text: Be purified in the light of the stars!
quotes.transcript: Be purified in the light of the stars!

quotes.text: The Nightmare will not take these sacred woods.
quotes.transcript: The nightmare will not take root in these sacred woods.

quotes.text: Your blood reeks of corruption.
quotes.transcript: Your blood reeks of corruption.

quotes.text: Nature graces me with its bounty!
quotes.transcript: Nature graces me with its bounty!

quotes.text: Stay down, Defiler!
quotes.transcript: Stay down, Defiler!

quotes.text: Only death can free you from the nightmare.
quotes.transcript: Only death can free you from the nightmare.

quotes.text: Your power burns. How have you twisted the size of a loom to obey your will?
quotes.transcript: Your power burns. How have you twisted the size of a loom to obey your will?

quotes.text: By tooth and claw, be purged!
quotes.transcript: By tooth and claw, be purged!

quotes.text: I am the Vessel of Nature's Fury!
quotes.transcript: I am the Vessel of Nature's Fury!

quotes.text: And do falladore!
quotes.transcript: And do falladore!

quotes.text: The Wilds are safe from the nightmare once again.
quotes.transcript: The Wilds are safe from the nightmare once again.

quotes.text: The Wilds, sustain me!
quotes.transcript: The Wilds, sustain me!

quotes.text: I am one with the flows of nature!
quotes.transcript: I am one with the flows of nature!

quotes.text: You are blessed with great restorative powers, Druid. But I will rip you all apart in the end!
quotes.transcript: You are blessed with great restorative powers, Druid. But I will rip you all apart in the end!

quotes.text: You fight with the fury of Ersoc himself! No! I will not be defeated!
quotes.transcript: You fight with the fury of Ersoc himself! No! I will not be defeated!

quotes.text: What power comes from those fangs, Defiler? You fight with the strength of the ancients themselves!
quotes.transcript: What power comes from those fangs, Defiler? You fight with the strength of the ancients themselves!

quotes.text: What is that you hold Druid?
quotes.transcript: What is that you hold Druid?

quotes.text: Alas, poor Nythendra! She served faithfully as Guardian of the Dream, only to be perverted into a gatekeeper of corruption.
I have faced the Nightmare before, but never has it had so thorough a stranglehold on the Dream. It hungers, desperate to seed its corruption. Do not let its whispers seduce you into madness!
I sense the touch of Cenarius upon this Iris. It is a portal that leads to Moonglade, but the way has been sealed by dark magic. We must sever the tendrils of power that bind it.
A well-earned victory! We must, however, stay vigilant. Deep inside the Nightmare Xavius remains, unvanquished. The enemy you fought here was merely his shadow.
An empty threat. You hold no sway over this realm, Nightmare Lord.
So says the shadow of Xavius.
They will be more than prepared, for your true power rests in the Nightmare.
I told you to leave me alone...
My bark is worse than my bite.
Prepare to become kindling.
quotes.transcript: Prepare to become kindling.

quotes.text: You will be uprooted!
quotes.transcript: You will be uprooted!

quotes.text: I pluck you like a flower.
quotes.transcript: I pluck you like a flower.

quotes.text: I... I think I have a crush on you.
quotes.transcript: I... I think I have a crush on you.

quotes.text: See you next fall!
quotes.transcript: See you next fall!

quotes.text: I want to say something clever, but I am stompter.
quotes.transcript: I want to say something clever, but I am stompter.

quotes.text: Why don't you make like a tree and get out of here?
quotes.transcript: Why don't you make like a tree and get out of here?

quotes.text: It's time we get to the root of the problem.
quotes.transcript: It's time we get to the root of the problem.

quotes.text: You have been rooting around here too long. Oh.
quotes.transcript: You have been rooting around here too long. Oh.

quotes.text: My limbs will grow back. Yours will not.
quotes.transcript: My limbs will grow back. Yours will not.

quotes.text: I snap you like a twig.
quotes.transcript: I snap you like a twig.

quotes.text: You will be my campfire!
quotes.transcript: You will be my campfire!

quotes.text: I will crush you to splinters!
quotes.transcript: I will crush you to splinters!

quotes.text: No, no! I refuse to... accept...
This must be some kind of... mistake...
You cannot... defeat a... god...
You will waste away slowly, painfully.
You wish to die? So be it!
I will break you!
quotes.transcript: I will break you!

quotes.text: What is this? Don't make me laugh!
quotes.transcript: What is this? Don't make me laugh!

quotes.text: None may challenge me and live!
quotes.transcript: None may challenge me and live!

quotes.text: Trespassers will be punished.
quotes.transcript: Trespassers will be punished!

quotes.text: I will fracture your feeble mind!
quotes.transcript: I will fracture your feeble mind.

quotes.text: Don't act surprised.
quotes.transcript: Don't act surprised!

quotes.text: You never stood a chance.
quotes.transcript: You never stood a chance.

quotes.text: Weak!
quotes.transcript: WEEK!

quotes.text: You deserve nothing less.
quotes.transcript: You deserve nothing less!

quotes.text: What other outcome could there be against a god?
quotes.transcript: What other outcome could there be when one is faced with the wrath of a god?

quotes.text: The same fate awaits all who oppose Xavius!
quotes.transcript: The same fate awaits all who oppose Xavius.

quotes.text: She will aid me in my conquest of Valshara, starting with your precious Temple of Elune.
quotes.transcript: She will aid me in my conquest of Valshara, starting with your precious Temple of Elune.

quotes.text: Such a dilemma, High Priestess.
quotes.transcript: Such a dilemma, High Priestess.

quotes.text: Your attacks are of little concern. The nightmare will restore me!
quotes.transcript: Your attacks are of little concern. The nightmare will restore me!

quotes.text: Surrender to the dark while you still can.
quotes.transcript: Surrender to the dark while you still can.

quotes.text: Duranda Whisperwind, I have longed for this encounter for many years.
quotes.transcript: Duranda Whisperwind, I have longed for this encounter for many years.

quotes.text: Force! Ha! So says the insect to the god!
quotes.transcript: Force! Ha! So says the insect to the god!

quotes.text: Do you have forever, child? The Legion does!
quotes.transcript: Do you have forever, child? The Legion does!

quotes.text: Nightmares are never forgotten.
quotes.transcript: Nightmares are never forgotten.

quotes.text: Time to crush your dreams!
quotes.transcript: Time to crush your dreams!

quotes.text: They are lying to you.
quotes.transcript: They are lying to you.

quotes.text: A pity you have come this far only to die at the hands of Xavius.
quotes.transcript: A pity you have come this far only to die at the hands of Xavius.

quotes.text: Kneel beside your beloved as he draws his final breath, or watch the temple of your goddess burn.
quotes.transcript: Kneel beside your beloved as he draws his final breath, or watch the temple of your goddess burn.

quotes.text: You dare trespass at the heart of the nightmare itself? Foolish mortals! Here, my will is absolute. Here, I am the master!
quotes.transcript: You dare trespass at the heart of the nightmare itself? Foolish mortals! Here, my will is absolute. Here, I am the master!

quotes.text: The nightmare has corrupted dragons, gods and legends. Your downfall will be simple and swift.
quotes.transcript: The nightmare has corrupted dragons, gods and legends. Your downfall will be simple and swift.

quotes.text: This fate awaits you all!
quotes.transcript: This fate awaits you all!

quotes.text: Your souls are mine! Woven for all time into the fabric of the nightmare!
quotes.transcript: Your souls are mine! Woven for all time into the fabric of the nightmare!

quotes.text: Your respite is over. Awaken and face your doom!
quotes.transcript: Your respite is over. Awaken and face your doom!

quotes.text: Your dreams are mine!
quotes.transcript: Your dreams are mine!

quotes.text: I must go attend to my prize. Malathar, I leave the claws to you. Use them to exterminate this filth.
quotes.transcript: I must go attend to my prize. Malathar, I leave the claws to you. Use them to exterminate this filth.

quotes.text: But what's this? Which Melfurion is real? And which is part of the nightmare? Hahahaha
quotes.transcript: But what's this? Which Melfurion is real? And which is part of the nightmare? Hahahaha

quotes.text: Yes again mortal! Hahahahaha!
quotes.transcript: Yes again mortal! Hahahahaha!

quotes.text: This will not be the last ally you lose! Even rats abandon a sinking ship!
quotes.transcript: This will not be the last ally you lose! Even rats abandon a sinking ship!

quotes.text: Oh, but I am not without mercy. You shall live long enough to watch your precious temple be destroyed.
quotes.transcript: Oh, but I am not without mercy. You shall live long enough to watch your precious temple be destroyed.

quotes.text: Your adoring husband will be joining me in the nightmare. His was a special invitation.
quotes.transcript: Your adoring husband will be joining me in the nightmare. His was a special invitation.

quotes.text: And our dear Ysera, would you believe she's had a change of heart?
quotes.transcript: And our dear Ysera, would you believe she's had a change of heart?

quotes.text: No! I will not permit it!
quotes.transcript: No! I will not permit it!

quotes.text: You will never stir again.
quotes.transcript: You will never stir again.

quotes.text: My victory is absolute! The power of Nightmare grows!
quotes.transcript: My victory is absolute! The power of Nightmare grows!

quotes.text: Give in to the nightmare!
quotes.transcript: Give in to the nightmare!

quotes.text: Your torment will be unending!
quotes.transcript: Your torment will be unending!

quotes.text: Yes, my son. It is your father, Malorn. Do not trust these invaders. You must purge them from a dream.
quotes.transcript: Yes, my son. It is your father, Malorn. Do not trust these invaders. You must purge them from a dream.

quotes.text: No, Ursak! When next you bear your fangs, it will be at my command!
quotes.transcript: No, Ursak! When next you bear your fangs, it will be at my command!

quotes.text: Ah, the mother of dreams has arrived at last.
quotes.transcript: Ah, the mother of dreams has arrived at last.

quotes.text: Those who challenge me only speed themselves to an agonizing death.
quotes.transcript: Those who challenge me only speed themselves to an agonizing death.

quotes.text: A fluke. Savor it and pray you do not face me next.
quotes.transcript: A fluke. Savor it and pray you do not face me next.

quotes.text: Silence, weakling. When you open your mouth again, it will be to cry for mercy.
quotes.transcript: Silence, weakling. When you open your mouth again, it will be to cry for mercy.

quotes.text: Bold words for a prisoner! Even an echo of my power was enough to overwhelm you!
quotes.transcript: Bold words for a prisoner! Even an echo of my power was enough to overwhelm you!

quotes.text: First you suffer, then you die!
quotes.transcript: First you suffer, then you die!

quotes.text: You can trust no one, not even your comrades!
quotes.transcript: You can trust no one, not even your comrades!

quotes.text: I've seen your deepest fears, and they are delicious.
quotes.transcript: I've seen your deepest fears, and they are delicious.

quotes.text: Hahahahaha! Our game is at an end! Behold, your dear Melfurion! It is the last you will see of him.
quotes.transcript: Hahahahaha! Our game is at an end! Behold, your dear Melfurion! It is the last you will see of him.

quotes.text: opp Panting
quotes.transcript: opp Panting

quotes.text: Another dreamer for my nightmare!
quotes.transcript: Another dreamer for my nightmare!

quotes.text: Eternal slumber, eternal madness.
quotes.transcript: Eternal slumber, eternal madness.

quotes.text: No more dreams, holy nightmare!
quotes.transcript: No more dreams, holy nightmare!

quotes.text: I'll slice into the heart of you!
quotes.transcript: I'll slice into the heart of you!

quotes.text: My victory draws near.
quotes.transcript: My victory draws near.

quotes.text: They are mine, Ysera! You cannot save them!
quotes.transcript: They are mine, Ysera! You cannot save them!

quotes.text: My work left unfinished.
quotes.transcript: My work left unfinished.

quotes.text: I will sever you from the waking world!
quotes.transcript: I will sever you from the waking world!

quotes.text: Time to cut the last tether to your mortal life!
quotes.transcript: Time to cut the last tether to your mortal life!

quotes.text: Feel the devastation of the nightmare!
quotes.transcript: Feel the devastation of the nightmare!

quotes.text: I'll level you one by one!
quotes.transcript: I'll level you one by one!

quotes.text: To come to the madness!
quotes.transcript: To come to the madness!

quotes.text: THERE IS NO ESCAPE!
quotes.transcript: THERE IS NO ESCAPE!

quotes.text: Foolish bear! You've fallen for my trap!
quotes.transcript: Foolish bear! You've fallen for my trap!

quotes.text: I am Lord of the Nightmare! I have been shaped by the powers of the Old Gods! Tramble before me!
quotes.transcript: I am Lord of the Nightmare! I have been shaped by the powers of the Old Gods! Tramble before me!

quotes.text: Welcome to my dream home. Your beloved Malfurion awaits within.
quotes.transcript: Welcome to my dream home. Your beloved Malfurion awaits within.

quotes.text: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha!
quotes.transcript: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha!

quotes.text: Hahahahaha! Foolish mortal! The tears of a loom are mine now!
quotes.transcript: Hahahahaha! Foolish mortal! The tears of a loom are mine now!

quotes.text: If Malfurion wants them back so badly, he can seek me out. I'll be waiting.
quotes.transcript: If Malfurion wants them back so badly, he can seek me out. I'll be waiting.

quotes.text: Be still, worm! I will deal with you shortly.
quotes.transcript: Be still, worm! I will deal with you shortly.

quotes.text: A pity you have come this far only to die at the hands of Xavius.
quotes.transcript: A pity you have come this far only to die at the hands of Xavius.

quotes.text: Your mind games hold no sway over me, dog.
quotes.transcript: Your mind games hold no sway over me, dog.

quotes.text: For every blow you strike, I will return even stronger!
quotes.transcript: For every blow you strike, I will return even stronger!

quotes.text: He put up quite a fight, but your arch druid belongs to me now.
quotes.transcript: He put up quite a fight, but your arch druid belongs to me now.

quotes.text: The Legion will not spare this world!
quotes.transcript: The Legion will not spare this world!

quotes.text: Azeroth cannot resist its fate forever!
quotes.transcript: Azeroth cannot resist its fate forever!

quotes.text: I'll see you writhe in pain!
quotes.transcript: I'll see you writhe in pain!
